required_text: Political advertisement paid for and approved by {candidate_name}, {party_affiliation}, for {office}
ai_disclosure_text: Created in whole or in part with the use of generative artificial intelligence (AI).
ai_disclosure_scope: Only applies when AI-generated content depicts a real person performing an action that did not actually occur, with intent to injure a candidate or deceive voters.
